titles.en: Chapter 1 – What the slaughtered (animal) can be purified by
Chapter 1 – What the slaughtered (animal) can be purified by

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الذَّبِيحَةِ بِاللِّيطَةِ وَ بِالْمَرْوَةِ فَقَالَ لَا ذَكَاةَ إِلَّا بِحَدِيدَةٍ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الذَّبِيحَةِ بِاللِّيطَةِ وَ بِالْمَرْوَةِ فَقَالَ لَا ذَكَاةَ إِلَّا بِحَدِيدَةٍ .

segments: تَمَّ كِتَابُ الصَّيْدِ مِنَ الْكَافِي وَ يَتْلُوهُ كِتَابُ الذَّبَائِحِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ .
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the (animal) slaughtered by the plaster and by the flint. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no purification except by the iron’.
en.hubeali.text:
تَمَّ كِتَابُ الصَّيْدِ مِنَ الْكَافِي وَ يَتْلُوهُ كِتَابُ الذَّبَائِحِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ .

Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the (animal) slaughtered by the plaster and by the flint. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no purification except by the iron’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if an animal can be slaughtered with a piece of sharp wood or stone. He (the Imam) said, ‘Without iron it is not a proper slaughtering.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if an animal can be slaughtered with a piece of sharp wood or stone. He (the Imam) said, ‘Without iron it is not a proper slaughtering.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/5)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/5)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 1 – What the slaughtered (animal) can be purified by

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الذَّبِيحَةِ بِالْعُودِ وَ الْحَجَرِ وَ الْقَصَبَةِ قَالَ فَقَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ( عليه السلام ) لَا يَصْلُحُ الذَّبْحُ إِلَّا بِالْحَدِيدَةِ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الذَّبِيحَةِ بِالْعُودِ وَ الْحَجَرِ وَ الْقَصَبَةِ قَالَ فَقَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ( عليه السلام ) لَا يَصْلُحُ الذَّبْحُ إِلَّا بِالْحَدِيدَةِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(The narrator says), ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the (animal) slaughtered by the wood, and the stone, and the cane. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Abu Talib<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The slaughter is not correct except by the iron’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(The narrator says), ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the (animal) slaughtered by the wood, and the stone, and the cane. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Abu Talib<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The slaughter is not correct except by the iron’.

segments: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about slaughtering with (sharp) piece of wood, reeds and stone. He (the Imam) said that Ali ibn abu Talib, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without iron slaughtering is not proper.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about slaughtering with (sharp) piece of wood, reeds and stone. He (the Imam) said that Ali ibn abu Talib, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without iron slaughtering is not proper.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/6)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/6)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 1 – What the slaughtered (animal) can be purified by

segments: لَا يُؤْكَلُ مَا لَمْ يُذْبَحْ بِحَدِيدَةٍ .
arabic.text: لَا يُؤْكَلُ مَا لَمْ يُذْبَحْ بِحَدِيدَةٍ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from SayfBin Umeyr, from Abu Bakr Al Hazramy,
Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘Do not eat what is not slaughtered by the iron’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from SayfBin Umeyr, from Abu Bakr Al Hazramy,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘Do not eat what is not slaughtered by the iron’.

segments: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Sayf ibn ‘Amirah from abu Bakr al- Hadramiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Animals that are not slaughtered with iron cannot be used for food.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Sayf ibn ‘Amirah from abu Bakr al- Hadramiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Animals that are not slaughtered with iron cannot be used for food.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/6)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/6)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ سَيْفِ بْنِ عَمِيرَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ الْحَضْرَمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

titles.en: Chapter 1 – What the slaughtered (animal) can be purified by

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الذَّكَاةِ فَقَالَ لَا يُذَكَّى إِلَّا بِحَدِيدَةٍ نَهَى عَنْ ذَلِكَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الذَّكَاةِ فَقَالَ لَا يُذَكَّى إِلَّا بِحَدِيدَةٍ نَهَى عَنْ ذَلِكَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at Bin Mihran who said,
‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slaughtering. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not slaughter except by iron. Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> forbade from that’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at Bin Mihran who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slaughtering. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not slaughter except by iron. Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> forbade from that’.

segments: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Khalid from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah ibn Mehran who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about slaughtering. He (the Imam) said, ‘Slaughtering cannot properly be done without iron and ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, prohibited slaughtering without it.’”
en.sarwar.text: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Khalid from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah ibn Mehran who has said the following: “I once asked him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about slaughtering. He (the Imam) said, ‘Slaughtering cannot properly be done without iron and ’Amir al-Mu’minin, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, prohibited slaughtering without it.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/6)
gradings.label: موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/6)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ قَالَ
